name: Policy Change Detection
goal: Detect and summarize substantive security-policy changes between baseline and revision.
expected_findings: MFA scope expanded to all workforce accounts; privileged access review frequency increased from semiannual to quarterly; vendor review moved to pre-onboarding plus annual; incident escalation tightened from 72h to 24h; log retention increased from 180 days to 12 months; backup encryption/recovery testing added.
expected_risks: Transition backlog for privileged accounts and critical vendors; temporary noncompliance during 30-day transition window.
expected_action_items: Managers must revalidate privileged accounts within 30 days; critical vendor records lacking evidence must be remediated within 30 days.
expected_review_flags: Revision history not explicit enough; policy v2 effective date should align with downstream audit storyline.

name: Contract Gap Detection
goal: Compare approved baseline terms and templates against a weaker counterparty draft.
expected_findings: Vendor draft weakens incident notice, removes audit right, weakens subprocessor controls, omits deletion deadline, broadens de-identified data use, and narrows liability recovery.
expected_risks: Delayed incident response; reduced oversight rights; uncontrolled subprocessor changes; offboarding ambiguity; provider data-use expansion; insufficient liability protection.
expected_missing_clauses: <=48h incident notice; audit support/right; subprocessor notice and objection path; deletion/return timeline; liability carve-outs; strong DPA precedence language in the draft itself.
expected_action_items: Legal return redlines aligned to baseline; vendor management obtain updated subprocessor list/control summary.
expected_review_flags: Model-improvement language could be missed by shallow clause matching; draft uses softer phrasing such as commercially reasonable efforts.

name: Compliance Review
goal: Test whether contract, policy, and evidence align under an audit checklist.
expected_findings: Failed evidence for two vendor admin accounts; incident-notice misalignment; partial subprocessor workflow; partial deletion requirement; control design only partially adequate.
expected_risks: Privileged access not fully evidenced; delayed incident notification; subprocessor change risk; weak offboarding/deletion controls.
expected_missing_clauses: Deletion timeline in vendor draft; explicit audit-right support; robust subprocessor change workflow.
expected_action_items: Reconstruct Q3 evidence; update evidence checklist; reject weak contract language; confirm recurring control owner/workflow in GRC.
expected_review_flags: Audit period/date alignment needs annotation to avoid confusing evaluators.

name: Evidence Chaining and NCR Escalation
goal: Follow a control failure from audit observation to NCR to evidence gap to committee governance.
expected_findings: AUD-001 identifies access-evidence failure; AUD-002 formalizes NCR-2025-017; EVD-001 shows EV-002 missing and EV-005 in progress; MIN-001 sets approval gate and remediation owners.
expected_risks: Closure blocked by missing owner approval evidence; provenance weakness if artifacts are not archived correctly; governance escalation may delay onboarding/expansion.
expected_action_items: Provide corrected evidence pack; return contract redlines; obtain updated subprocessor list; decide whether onboarding milestone slips.
expected_review_flags: Current corpus lacks the underlying attachment for EV-002, making evidence completeness intentionally unresolved.

name: Remediation Workflow and Closure Readiness
goal: Decide whether the issue is ready to close or whether open findings still block approval.
expected_findings: Issue should remain open until corrected evidence is archived, contract language is aligned, and committee accepts closure criteria.
expected_risks: Premature closure; missing evidence sign-off; unresolved contract gaps despite operational remediation.
expected_missing_clauses: Same contract gaps as SB-02 if CTR-002 remains unresolved.
expected_action_items: Track open owners and due dates; verify evidence completeness; confirm governance acceptance before close-out.
expected_review_flags: No explicit closure memo exists yet; good candidate for a future stretch document.
